positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a celestial forest biome at dusk. The scene features bioluminescent, stylized flora and fauna, including glowing stylized moths and whimsical, curved trees with minimal, strong silhouettes. The color palette is deep indigo, electric sapphire blue, luminous teal, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, highly detailed, and suitable for a high-contrast screen print on fabric. Use geometric vector elements combined with soft, ethereal glow effects. Studio quality, graphic novel poster style, highly intricate linework, central composition, minimalist negative space.
